title: telanthera flavescens
intro: Telanthera flavescens, also known as yellow heliotrope, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and oval-shaped leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Telanthera flavescens include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and skincare products.
